parameters.query:
SELECT
  assigned_agent,
  COUNT(*) as flagged_count,
  ROUND(AVG(feedback_score),2) as avg_score,
  MIN(feedback_score) as min_score
FROM task_board
WHERE status = 'flagged'
  AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY assigned_agent
ORDER BY avg_score ASC;

INSERT INTO audit_log (event_type, source, payload, timestamp)
VALUES ('PROMPT_PROMOTED', 'WF08', '{{ JSON.stringify({has_issues: $json.has_issues, summary: $json.report.substring(0,300)}) }}'::jsonb, NOW());

Review flagged outputs and update Dify prompts manually.' : '✅ ' + $('Code — Analyze Flags').item.json.report }}
